status_ja: ±15%を超える偏りは現時点でありません(判定継続中)
status_en: No segment deviates beyond ±15% ROI so far (evaluation continues)
comment_ja: 📉昨日は33件中16勝17敗、損益は-4,250円。勝った割合は累計54.5%を維持しているが、戻ってきた割合は-4.2%と小幅マイナスが続く。注目点は💰Chicago White Soxのオッズ2.00的中など複数の勝ちがある一方、Phillies関連3件がすべて外れ、トータルを押し下げた形。
comment_en: Yesterday's record was 16 wins and 17 losses across 33 picks, with a net result of -4,250 yen. The cumulative win rate holds at 54.5%, while the return rate remains slightly negative at -4.2%. Notable points include the Chicago White Sox win at odds of 2.00, while all three Phillies picks missed, which weighed down the overall result.
